texto: Stand tall with your feet on the ground, feel the earth under your feet and raise your head towards the sun. Take in its warmth and carry it with you. When you feel cold with fear, when you feel alone and lost, look to the sun, close your eyes and let it warm your heart, let it feed your soul, let it remind you of your divinity.” –Betsy Chasse
explicacao: Citação de Kim Weiss sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Stand tall with your feet on the ground, feel the earth under your feet and raise your head towar…” articula reflexao, sun, stand em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
